response:
Maria buys granola bars that come in boxes of 12 bars per box, with each bar containing 90 calories. She has already eaten 3 bars. 

The total number of bars in a box is 12, so the number of bars remaining is 12 - 3 = 9 bars.

Each bar has 90 calories, so the total number of calories remaining is 9 bars × 90 calories/bar = 810 calories.

The remaining calories in the box are 810.

The remaining calories in the box are 810.
